chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRAs 515, 516 & 517 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No. 26 2. For orders on CMA No.247/2021 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.248/2021 05.11.2025 Mr. Mohabat Hussain Awan, advocate for the applicant These three reference applications are pending since 2020 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. Today learned counsel remained unable to assist and appears unprepared. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matters. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
